name: Royal Oak
description:
The Royal Oak Essential brings Gerald Genta's revolutionary 1972 design to the most accessible price point in the Artemis collection. The black dial configuration gives the Royal Oak an even more assertive, contemporary character — the octagonal bezel and tapisserie pattern rendered in contrast that demands attention.

For those who want to wear one of the most influential designs in watchmaking history without the premium price tag, this is the entry. The Royal Oak changed the industry. The Essential version lets you wear that legacy on your wrist from day one.
descriptionShort: The Royal Oak's revolutionary DNA at the Essential entry price. Black dial — pure impact.
keyPoints: Iconic octagonal bezel — Gerald Genta's masterpiece
Essential range — accessible entry to AP
seoTitle: Audemars Piguet Royal Oak Black Dial Essential | Artemis Watches Montreal
seoDescription: Shop the Audemars Piguet Royal Oak (Black Dial, Essential) at Artemis — Montreal's premier luxury watch destination. Essential range, 30-day guarantee, free shipping. $330 CAD.
